notes_zh:
- **新增** 快捷面板 Ctrl+P / Ctrl+N 导航历史记录
- **新增** 「回车直接粘贴到应用」开关，关闭后回车仅复制到剪贴板
- **新增** 自动检查更新开关及检查频率设置
- **新增** 快捷面板右下角设置入口
- **优化** 复制操作关闭快捷面板并统一显示全局 Toast 提示
- **优化** 辅助功能操作
notes_en:
- **New** Ctrl+P / Ctrl+N to navigate history in Quick Paste panel
- **New** "Paste to App on Enter" toggle — when off, Enter copies to clipboard only
- **New** Auto update check toggle and check interval setting
- **New** Settings shortcut in Quick Paste panel footer
- **Improve** Copy now dismisses Quick Paste panel with unified global toast feedback
- **Improve** Accessibility workflow
